title: The Year Of The Wood Dragon Came To An End Giving Way To The Year Of The Wood Snake
section_path: The Year Of The Wood Dragon Came To An End Giving Way To The Year Of The Wood Snake
section_path_text: The Year Of The Wood Dragon Came To An End Giving Way To The Year Of The Wood Snake
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
A year ago, Doric's Weekly Insight highlighted a relatively stable dry bulk market, with the Panamax segment standing out after posting a weekly gain of $1,317 and closing at $15,263 per day. The geared segments displayed a predominantly sideways trend but ended positively, with Supramax rates at $11,711 and Handysize at $10,735 per day. Meanwhile, the Capesize segment lost momentum as the week progressed, concluding at $17,708 per day.
